scripts.dev:all: concurrently --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 2000 --names api,operator,coach,video,stats --prefix-colors cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:operator" "npm run dev:coach" "npm run dev:video" "npm run dev:stats"
scripts.stats:install: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (-not (Test-Path '.venv\Scripts\python.exe')) { py -3 -m venv .venv }; .\.venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt"
